nodes.name: Build Callback Router Request
nodes.notes: Approval callbacks must use approval-resolve:<approval_id>:<decision>[:reason]. Legacy nonce-token state is intentionally unsupported.

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: ={{ $('Build Callback Router Request').first().json.router_mode === 'approval_resolve' ? ($('Build Callback Router Request').first().json.approval_decision === 'reject' ? 'Rejected' : 'Approved') : 'Received' }}

meta.description: Receives Telegram webhook events, requires TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET, builds normalized odin intake enqueue envelopes for odin-core, and routes approval-resolve callbacks through the shared Odin OS dispatch workflow. Approval callback data carries approval_id and decision instead of any legacy nonce token.
